import sys
from PyQt5.QtWidgets import QApplication, QMainWindow, QPushButton, QVBoxLayout, QWidget, QDialog, QTableWidget, QTableWidgetItem, QLineEdit, QLabel, QHBoxLayout, QGridLayout
from PyQt5.QtGui import QIcon, QFont, QFontDatabase, QColor, QPen, QBrush
from PyQt5.QtCore import Qt, QPoint

class ConfigEditor(QDialog):
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        self.setWindowTitle("配置编辑器")
        self.setGeometry(300, 300, 800, 600)

        # 加载字体
        font_db = QFontDatabase()
        font_id = font_db.addApplicationFont("gui/SDK_SC_Web65.ttf")
        font_family = font_db.applicationFontFamilies(font_id)[0]
        self.setFont(QFont(font_family, 12, QFont.Bold))

        # 创建主体布局
        main_layout = QHBoxLayout()

        # 左侧的Excel样式图
        self.table_widget = QTableWidget()
        self.table_widget.setRowCount(2)
        self.table_widget.setColumnCount(2)
        self.table_widget.setSpan(0, 0, 2, 2)
        main_layout.addWidget(self.table_widget)

        # 右侧的编辑区
        edit_layout = QVBoxLayout()

        # 编辑班级名
        class_name_label = QLabel("班级名:")
        class_name_label.setFont(QFont(font_family, 12, QFont.Bold))
        self.class_name_edit = QLineEdit()
        self.class_name_edit.setFont(QFont(font_family, 12, QFont.Bold))
        self.class_name_edit.textChanged.connect(self.update_class_name)
        edit_layout.addWidget(class_name_label)
        edit_layout.addWidget(self.class_name_edit)

        # 增加行
        add_row_button = QPushButton("增加行")
        add_row_button.setFont(QFont(font_family, 12, QFont.Bold))
        add_row_button.setStyleSheet("QPushButton { background-color: white; border: 2px solid black; border-radius: 10px; height: 50px; }")
        add_row_button.clicked.connect(self.add_row)
        edit_layout.addWidget(add_row_button)

        # 减少行
        remove_row_button = QPushButton("减少行")
        remove_row_button.setFont(QFont(font_family, 12, QFont.Bold))
        remove_row_button.setStyleSheet("QPushButton { background-color: white; border: 2px solid black; border-radius: 10px; height: 50px; }")
        remove_row_button.clicked.connect(self.remove_row)
        edit_layout.addWidget(remove_row_button)

        # 增加列
        add_col_button = QPushButton("增加列")
        add_col_button.setFont(QFont(font_family, 12, QFont.Bold))
        add_col_button.setStyleSheet("QPushButton { background-color: white; border: 2px solid black; border-radius: 10px; height: 50px; }")
        add_col_button.clicked.connect(self.add_column)
        edit_layout.addWidget(add_col_button)

        # 减少列
        remove_col_button = QPushButton("减少列")
        remove_col_button.setFont(QFont(font_family, 12, QFont.Bold))
        remove_col_button.setStyleSheet("QPushButton { background-color: white; border: 2px solid black; border-radius: 10px; height: 50px; }")
        remove_col_button.clicked.connect(self.remove_column)
        edit_layout.addWidget(remove_col_button)

        # 设置为排座格
        mark_seating_button = QPushButton("设置为排座格")
        mark_seating_button.setFont(QFont(font_family, 12, QFont.Bold))
        mark_seating_button.setStyleSheet("QPushButton { background-color: white; border: 2px solid black; border-radius: 10px; height: 50px; }")
        mark_seating_button.clicked.connect(self.mark_as_seating)
        edit_layout.addWidget(mark_seating_button)

        main_layout.addLayout(edit_layout)

        self.setLayout(main_layout)
        self.selected_cells = []

        # 合并前两行的所有列
        self.update_class_name()

    def update_class_name(self):
        if self.table_widget.rowCount() >= 2:
            self.table_widget.setSpan(0, 0, 2, self.table_widget.columnCount())
        if self.class_name_edit.text():
            item = QTableWidgetItem(self.class_name_edit.text())
            item.setTextAlignment(Qt.AlignCenter)
            item.setFont(QFont("gui/SDK_SC_Web65.ttf", 12, QFont.Bold))
            self.table_widget.setItem(0, 0, item)

    def add_row(self):
        current_row_count = self.table_widget.rowCount()
        if current_row_count > 2:
            self.table_widget.insertRow(current_row_count)
        else:
            self.table_widget.insertRow(current_row_count)
            self.table_widget.setSpan(0, 0, 2, self.table_widget.columnCount())
            self.update_class_name()

    def remove_row(self):
        current_row_count = self.table_widget.rowCount()
        if current_row_count > 2:
            self.table_widget.removeRow(current_row_count - 1)
        self.table_widget.setSpan(0, 0, 2, self.table_widget.columnCount())
        self.update_class_name()

    def add_column(self):
        current_col_count = self.table_widget.columnCount()
        self.table_widget.insertColumn(current_col_count)
        self.table_widget.setSpan(0, 0, 2, self.table_widget.columnCount())
        self.update_class_name()

    def remove_column(self):
        current_col_count = self.table_widget.columnCount()
        if current_col_count > 2:
            self.table_widget.removeColumn(current_col_count - 1)
        self.table_widget.setSpan(0, 0, 2, self.table_widget.columnCount())
        self.update_class_name()

    def mark_as_seating(self):
        for cell in self.selected_cells:
            item = QTableWidgetItem()
            item.setBackground(QColor(180, 180, 180))
            item.setTextAlignment(Qt.AlignCenter)
            self.table_widget.setItem(cell.row(), cell.column(), item)
            self.table_widget.item(cell.row(), cell.column()).setFlags(Qt.ItemIsEnabled)
            self.table_widget.item(cell.row(), cell.column()).setSelected(False)
        self.selected_cells = []

    def mousePressEvent(self, event):
        if event.button() == Qt.LeftButton:
            self.start_point = self.table_widget.indexAt(event.pos())
            if self.start_point.isValid():
                self.selected_cells = [self.start_point]

    def mouseMoveEvent(self, event):
        if event.buttons() & Qt.LeftButton:
            end_point = self.table_widget.indexAt(event.pos())
            if end_point.isValid() and end_point != self.start_point:
                rows = range(min(self.start_point.row(), end_point.row()), max(self.start_point.row(), end_point.row()) + 1)
                cols = range(min(self.start_point.column(), end_point.column()), max(self.start_point.column(), end_point.column()) + 1)
                self.selected_cells = [QPoint(row, col) for row in rows for col in cols]
                self.table_widget.clearSelection()
                for cell in self.selected_cells:
                    self.table_widget.item(cell.row(), cell.column()).setSelected(True)

class MainWindow(QMainWindow):
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        self.setWindowTitle("班级随机排座位系统")
        self.setGeometry(300, 300, 600, 400)

        # 设置窗口图标
        self.setWindowIcon(QIcon("icon.ico"))

        # 创建布局管理器
        layout = QVBoxLayout()

        # 加载字体
        font_db = QFontDatabase()
        font_id = font_db.addApplicationFont("gui/SDK_SC_Web65.ttf")
        font_family = font_db.applicationFontFamilies(font_id)[0]
        font = QFont(font_family, 12, QFont.Bold)

        # 创建按钮
        self.create_config_button = QPushButton("创建配置", self)
        self.create_config_button.setFont(font)
        self.create_config_button.setStyleSheet("QPushButton { background-color: white; border: 2px solid black; border-radius: 10px; height: 50px; }")
        self.create_config_button.clicked.connect(self.open_config_editor)

        self.edit_config_button = QPushButton("编辑配置", self)
        self.edit_config_button.setFont(font)
        self.edit_config_button.setStyleSheet("QPushButton { background-color: white; border: 2px solid black; border-radius: 10px; height: 50px; }")

        self.select_config_button = QPushButton("选择配置", self)
        self.select_config_button.setFont(font)
        self.select_config_button.setStyleSheet("QPushButton { background-color: white; border: 2px solid black; border-radius: 10px; height: 50px; }")

        self.start_seating_button = QPushButton("开始排座", self)
        self.start_seating_button.setFont(font)
        self.start_seating_button.setStyleSheet("QPushButton { background-color: white; border: 2px solid black; border-radius: 10px; height: 50px; }")

        # 将按钮添加到布局
        layout.addWidget(self.create_config_button)
        layout.addWidget(self.edit_config_button)
        layout.addWidget(self.select_config_button)
        layout.addWidget(self.start_seating_button)

        # 设置内容窗口部件
        container = QWidget()
        container.setLayout(layout)
        self.setCentralWidget(container)

    def open_config_editor(self):
        config_editor = ConfigEditor()
        config_editor.exec_()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    app = QApplication(sys.argv)
    # 加载字体
    font_db = QFontDatabase()
    font_id = font_db.addApplicationFont("gui/SDK_SC_Web65.ttf")
    font_family = font_db.applicationFontFamilies(font_id)[0]
    app.setFont(QFont(font_family, 12, QFont.Bold))  # 设置全局字体
    window = MainWindow()
    window.show()
    sys.exit(app.exec_())

这是一个使用 PyQt5 库构建的简单图形用户界面 (GUI) 应用程序，用于班级座位的随机排座系统。该代码包含一个主窗口和一个配置编辑对话框，让用户能够动态地添加或删除表格行和列，并输入班级名称。下面是对代码的具体解释及各个部分的功能：

### 主要类：

1. **ConfigEditor(QDialog)**:
   - 这是一个对话框类，提供编辑表格配置的功能。
   - 用户可以输入班级名称，并对表格进行动态的行列添加或删除。
   - 还有一个设置为排座格的按钮，能够标记用户选择的单元格。

   - **关键方法**:
     - `update_class_name()`: 更新表格中的班级名称并合并前两行。
     - `add_row()`: 增加表格的行。
     - `remove_row()`: 删除表格的最后一行，确保表格至少保留两行。
     - `add_column()`: 增加表格的列。
     - `remove_column()`: 删除表格的最后一列，确保至少保留两列。
     - `mark_as_seating()`: 将选中的单元格标记为排座格（颜色变为灰色）。
     - `mousePressEvent()` 和 `mouseMoveEvent()`: 用于支持通过鼠标选择多个单元格。

2. **MainWindow(QMainWindow)**:
   - 这是应用程序的主窗口，包含创建、编辑和选择配置的按钮。
   - 用户可以通过点击“创建配置”来打开 `ConfigEditor` 对话框。

### 代码结构:
- **导入模块**: 代码头部导入了 PyQt5 的必要组件。
- **窗体设置**: 窗体的标题、几何尺寸和图标设置。
- **按钮设置**: 使用 `QPushButton` 创建功能按钮，并连接到相应的槽函数。
- **字体加载**: 使用 `QFontDatabase` 加载并应用自定义字体。
  
### 使用说明:
- 运行该应用后，用户会看到一个按钮界面。
- 点击“创建配置”按钮会弹出配置编辑器窗口，用户可以在此窗口中添加、删除表格的行和列，设定班级名称，以及选定座位。

### 改进点:
根据需求，还可以增加以下功能：
- 数据保存与加载：将配置保存到文件中，或者从文件中加载配置。
- 自定义座位颜色或样式：在基础上增加更多的个性化设置。

如果有具体想要修改或实现的功能，欢迎进一步提问！

2. **确保班级名框有黑色实心框线**: 需要在 `QLineEdit` 的样式表中设置边框样式，以确保无论何时都显示出黑色的实心边框。

import sys
from PyQt5.QtWidgets import (
    QApplication, QMainWindow, QPushButton, QVBoxLayout,
    QWidget, QDialog, QTableWidget, QTableWidgetItem,
    QLabel, QHBoxLayout, QLineEdit
)

from PyQt5.QtCore import Qt, QPoint


class ConfigEditor(QDialog):
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        self.setWindowTitle("配置编辑器")
        self.setGeometry(300, 300, 800, 600)

        # 加载字体
        font_db = QFontDatabase()
        font_id = font_db.addApplicationFont("gui/SDK_SC_Web65.ttf")

        # 创建主体布局
        main_layout = QHBoxLayout()

        # 左侧的Excel样式图
        self.table_widget = QTableWidget()
        self.table_widget.setRowCount(2)
        self.table_widget.setColumnCount(2)
        self.table_widget.setSpan(0, 0, 2, 2)
        main_layout.addWidget(self.table_widget)

        # 右侧的编辑区
        edit_layout = QVBoxLayout()

        # 编辑班级名
        class_name_label = QLabel("班级名:")
        class_name_label.setFont(QFont(font_family, 12, QFont.Bold))
        self.class_name_edit = QLineEdit()
        self.class_name_edit.setFont(QFont(font_family, 12, QFont.Bold))
        self.class_name_edit.setStyleSheet("QLineEdit { border: 2px solid black; border-radius: 3px; padding: 5px; }")
        self.class_name_edit.textChanged.connect(self.update_class_name)
        edit_layout.addWidget(class_name_label)
        edit_layout.addWidget(self.class_name_edit)

        # 增加行
        add_row_button = QPushButton("增加行")
        add_row_button.setFont(QFont(font_family, 12, QFont.Bold))
        add_row_button.setStyleSheet("QPushButton { background-color: white; border: 2px solid black; border-radius: 10px; height: 50px; }")
        add_row_button.clicked.connect(self.add_row)
        edit_layout.addWidget(add_row_button)

        # 减少行
        remove_row_button = QPushButton("减少行")
        remove_row_button.setFont(QFont(font_family, 12, QFont.Bold))
        remove_row_button.setStyleSheet("QPushButton { background-color: white; border: 2px solid black; border-radius: 10px; height: 50px; }")
        remove_row_button.clicked.connect(self.remove_row)
        edit_layout.addWidget(remove_row_button)

        # 增加列
        add_col_button = QPushButton("增加列")
        add_col_button.setFont(QFont(font_family, 12, QFont.Bold))
        add_col_button.setStyleSheet("QPushButton { background-color: white; border: 2px solid black; border-radius: 10px; height: 50px; }")
        add_col_button.clicked.connect(self.add_column)
        edit_layout.addWidget(add_col_button)

        # 减少列
        remove_col_button = QPushButton("减少列")
        remove_col_button.setFont(QFont(font_family, 12, QFont.Bold))
        remove_col_button.setStyleSheet("QPushButton { background-color: white; border: 2px solid black; border-radius: 10px; height: 50px; }")
        remove_col_button.clicked.connect(self.remove_column)
        edit_layout.addWidget(remove_col_button)

    def create_button(self, text, callback, layout):
        button = QPushButton(text)
        button.setFont(QFont("gui/SDK_SC_Web65.ttf", 12, QFont.Bold))
        button.setStyleSheet("QPushButton { background-color: white; border: 2px solid black; border-radius: 10px; height: 50px; }")
        button.clicked.connect(callback)
        layout.addWidget(button)

    def update_class_name(self):
        if self.table_widget.rowCount() >= 2:
            self.table_widget.setSpan(0, 0, 2, self.table_widget.columnCount())

        for i in range(self.table_widget.rowCount()):
            for j in range(self.table_widget.columnCount()):
                item = self.table_widget.item(i, j)
                if item is None:
                    continue
                # 保持原有的背景色和文本格式
                item.setBackground(QColor(255, 255, 255))  # 恢复原颜色
                item.setTextAlignment(Qt.AlignCenter)

        if self.class_name_edit.text():
            class_name_item = QLabel(self.class_name_edit.text())
            class_name_item.setAlignment(Qt.AlignCenter)
            class_name_item.setStyleSheet("QLabel { border: 2px solid black; padding: 5px; }")  # 黑色实心边框
            self.table_widget.setCellWidget(0, 0, class_name_item)

    def add_row(self):
        current_row_count = self.table_widget.rowCount()
        if current_row_count > 2:
            self.table_widget.insertRow(current_row_count)
        else:
            self.table_widget.insertRow(current_row_count)
            self.table_widget.setSpan(0, 0, 2, self.table_widget.columnCount())
            self.update_class_name()

    def remove_row(self):
        current_row_count = self.table_widget.rowCount()
        if current_row_count > 2:
            self.table_widget.removeRow(current_row_count - 1)
        self.table_widget.setSpan(0, 0, 2, self.table_widget.columnCount())
        self.update_class_name()

    def add_column(self):
        current_col_count = self.table_widget.columnCount()
        self.table_widget.insertColumn(current_col_count)
        self.table_widget.setSpan(0, 0, 2, self.table_widget.columnCount())
        self.update_class_name()

    def remove_column(self):
        current_col_count = self.table_widget.columnCount()
        if current_col_count > 2:
            self.table_widget.removeColumn(current_col_count - 1)
        self.table_widget.setSpan(0, 0, 2, self.table_widget.columnCount())
        self.update_class_name()

    def mark_as_aisle(self):
        self.mark_cells(QColor(144, 238, 144))  # 浅绿色

    def mark_as_desk(self):
        self.mark_cells(QColor(210, 180, 140))  # 浅棕色

    def mark_as_wall(self):
        self.mark_cells(QColor(169, 169, 169))  # 灰色

    def mark_as_door(self):
        self.mark_cells(QColor(255, 255, 224))  # 浅黄色

    def mark_cells(self, color):
        if not self.selected_cells:
            return

        first_row, first_col = self.selected_cells[0].y(), self.selected_cells[0].x()
        last_row, last_col = self.selected_cells[-1].y(), self.selected_cells[-1].x()

        # 合并选择的单元格
        self.table_widget.setSpan(first_row, first_col, last_row - first_row + 1, last_col - first_col + 1)

        # 设置背景色
        item = QTableWidgetItem()
        item.setBackground(color)
        item.setTextAlignment(Qt.AlignCenter)
        self.table_widget.setItem(first_row, first_col, item)

        # 清空选中的单元格
        self.selected_cells = []

    def mark_as_seating(self):
        for cell in self.selected_cells:
            item = QTableWidgetItem()
            item.setBackground(QColor(180, 180, 180))  # 背景色为灰色
            item.setTextAlignment(Qt.AlignCenter)
            self.table_widget.setItem(cell.row(), cell.column(), item)
            self.table_widget.item(cell.row(), cell.column()).setFlags(Qt.ItemIsEnabled | Qt.ItemIsSelectable)  # 确保单元格可选择
            self.table_widget.item(cell.row(), cell.column()).setSelected(False)
        self.selected_cells = []  # 清空选中的单元格

    def mousePressEvent(self, event):
        if event.button() == Qt.LeftButton:
            self.start_point = self.table_widget.indexAt(event.pos())
            if self.start_point.isValid():
                self.selected_cells = [self.start_point]

    def mouseMoveEvent(self, event):
        if event.buttons() & Qt.LeftButton:
            end_point = self.table_widget.indexAt(event.pos())
            if end_point.isValid() and end_point != self.start_point:
                rows = range(min(self.start_point.row(), end_point.row()), max(self.start_point.row(), end_point.row()) + 1)
                cols = range(min(self.start_point.column(), end_point.column()), max(self.start_point.column(), end_point.column()) + 1)
                self.selected_cells = [QPoint(row, col) for row in rows for col in cols]
                self.table_widget.clearSelection()
                for cell in self.selected_cells:
                    if self.table_widget.item(cell.row(), cell.column()) is not None:  # 确保单元格存在
                        self.table_widget.item(cell.row(), cell.column()).setSelected(True)

        layout.addWidget(button)

    def update_class_name(self):
        if self.table_widget.rowCount() >= 2:
            self.table_widget.setSpan(0, 0, 1, self.table_widget.columnCount())
        
        # 更新班级名显示
        class_name = self.class_name_edit.text()
        if class_name:
            label_item = QLabel(class_name)
            label_item.setAlignment(Qt.AlignCenter)
            label_item.setStyleSheet("QLabel { border: 2px solid black; padding: 5px; }")  # 黑色实心边框
            self.table_widget.setCellWidget(0, 0, label_item)

        # 更新表格中的显示
        for (row, col), (cell_type, color) in self.cell_types.items():
            self.update_cell_visual(row, col, cell_type, color)

    def update_cell_visual(self, row, col, cell_type, color):
        label_item = QLabel(cell_type)
        label_item.setAlignment(Qt.AlignCenter)
        label_item.setStyleSheet(f"background-color: {color.name()}; border: none; padding: 5px;") 
        self.table_widget.setCellWidget(row, col, label_item)

    def add_row(self):
        current_row_count = self.table_widget.rowCount()
        self.table_widget.insertRow(current_row_count)
        
        # 记录新单元格类型
        for col in range(self.table_widget.columnCount()):
            self.cell_types[(current_row_count, col)] = (None, QColor(255, 255, 255))  # 初始化类型和颜色
        self.update_class_name()

    def remove_row(self):
        current_row_count = self.table_widget.rowCount()
        if current_row_count > 1:
            self.table_widget.removeRow(current_row_count - 1)
            for col in range(self.table_widget.columnCount()):
                del self.cell_types[(current_row_count - 1, col)]  # 移除类型数据
        self.update_class_name()

    def add_column(self):
        current_col_count = self.table_widget.columnCount()
        self.table_widget.insertColumn(current_col_count)
        
        # 记录新单元格类型
        for row in range(self.table_widget.rowCount()):
            self.cell_types[(row, current_col_count)] = (None, QColor(255, 255, 255))  # 初始化类型和颜色
        self.update_class_name()

    def remove_column(self):
        current_col_count = self.table_widget.columnCount()
        if current_col_count > 1:
            self.table_widget.removeColumn(current_col_count - 1)
            for row in range(self.table_widget.rowCount()):
                del self.cell_types[(row, current_col_count - 1)]  # 移除类型数据
        self.update_class_name()

    def mark_as_aisle(self):
        self.mark_cells("过道", QColor(144, 238, 144))  # 浅绿色

    def mark_as_desk(self):
        self.mark_cells("讲台", QColor(210, 180, 140))  # 浅棕色

    def mark_as_wall(self):
        self.mark_cells("墙", QColor(169, 169, 169))  # 灰色

    def mark_as_door(self):
        self.mark_cells("门", QColor(255, 255, 224))  # 浅黄色

    def mark_cells(self, cell_type, color):
        if not self.selected_cells:
            return

        # 合并所选单元格并设置背景颜色
        first_row, first_col = self.selected_cells[0].y(), self.selected_cells[0].x()
        last_row, last_col = self.selected_cells[-1].y(), self.selected_cells[-1].x()

        # 合并选择的单元格
        self.table_widget.setSpan(first_row, first_col, last_row - first_row + 1, last_col - first_col + 1)

        # 更新cell_types字典
        for row in range(first_row, last_row + 1):
            for col in range(first_col, last_col + 1):
                self.cell_types[(row, col)] = (cell_type, color)  # 保存类型和颜色

        # 更新显示
        self.update_cell_visual(first_row, first_col, cell_type, color)

        # 清空选中的单元格
        self.selected_cells.clear()

    def mark_as_seating(self):
        for cell in self.selected_cells:
            item = QTableWidgetItem()
            item.setBackground(QColor(180, 180, 180))  # 设置背景颜色为灰色
            item.setTextAlignment(Qt.AlignCenter)
            self.table_widget.setItem(cell.row(), cell.column(), item)
            self.table_widget.item(cell.row(), cell.column()).setFlags(Qt.ItemIsEnabled | Qt.ItemIsSelectable)  # 确保单元格可选择

        self.selected_cells.clear()  # 清空选中的单元格

    def mousePressEvent(self, event):
        if event.button() == Qt.LeftButton:
            self.start_point = self.table_widget.indexAt(event.pos())
            if self.start_point.isValid():
                self.selected_cells = [self.start_point]

    def mouseMoveEvent(self, event):
        if event.buttons() & Qt.LeftButton:
            end_point = self.table_widget.indexAt(event.pos())
            if end_point.isValid() and end_point != self.start_point:
                rows = range(min(self.start_point.row(), end_point.row()), max(self.start_point.row(), end_point.row()) + 1)
                cols = range(min(self.start_point.column(), end_point.column()), max(self.start_point.column(), end_point.column()) + 1)
                self.selected_cells = [QPoint(row, col) for row in rows for col in cols]
                self.table_widget.clearSelection()
                for cell in self.selected_cells:
                    if self.table_widget.item(cell.row(), cell.column()) is not None:  # 确保单元格存在
                        self.table_widget.item(cell.row(), cell.column()).setSelected(True)

        # 通过合并操作显示班级名，合并2行

            self.table_widget.setSpan(0, 0, 2, self.table_widget.columnCount())

            self.table_widget.setCellWidget(0, 0, label_item)

        # 更新表格中的显示
        for (row, col), (cell_type, color) in self.cell_types.items():
            self.update_cell_visual(row, col, cell_type, color)

    def update_cell_visual(self, row, col, cell_type, color):
        if cell_type:  # 只在 cell_type 有值时更新显示
            label_item = QLabel(cell_type)
            label_item.setAlignment(Qt.AlignCenter)
            label_item.setStyleSheet(f"background-color: {color.name()}; border: none; padding: 5px;") 
            self.table_widget.setCellWidget(row, col, label_item)

        current_row_count = self.table_widget.rowCount()
        self.table_widget.insertRow(current_row_count)
        
        # 为新单元格初始化类型和颜色
        for col in range(self.table_widget.columnCount()):
            self.cell_types[(current_row_count, col)] = (None, QColor(255, 255, 255))  # 初始化类型和颜色
        self.update_class_name()

    def remove_row(self):
        current_row_count = self.table_widget.rowCount()
        if current_row_count > 1:
            self.table_widget.removeRow(current_row_count - 1)
            for col in range(self.table_widget.columnCount()):
                del self.cell_types[(current_row_count - 1, col)]  # 移除类型及颜色
        self.update_class_name()

    def add_column(self):
        current_col_count = self.table_widget.columnCount()
        self.table_widget.insertColumn(current_col_count)
        
        # 为新单元格初始化类型和颜色
        for row in range(self.table_widget.rowCount()):
            self.cell_types[(row, current_col_count)] = (None, QColor(255, 255, 255))  # 初始化类型和颜色
        self.update_class_name()

    def remove_column(self):
        current_col_count = self.table_widget.columnCount()
        if current_col_count > 1:
            self.table_widget.removeColumn(current_col_count - 1)
            for row in range(self.table_widget.rowCount()):
                del self.cell_types[(row, current_col_count - 1)]  # 移除类型及颜色
        self.update_class_name()

    def mark_as_aisle(self):
        self.mark_cells("过道", QColor(144, 238, 144))  # 浅绿色

    def mark_as_desk(self):
        self.mark_cells("讲台", QColor(210, 180, 140))  # 浅棕色

    def mark_as_wall(self):
        self.mark_cells("墙", QColor(169, 169, 169))  # 灰色

    def mark_as_door(self):
        self.mark_cells("门", QColor(255, 255, 224))  # 浅黄色

    def mark_cells(self, cell_type, color):
        if not self.selected_cells:
            return

        # 合并选择的单元格
        first_row, first_col = self.selected_cells[0].y(), self.selected_cells[0].x()
        last_row, last_col = self.selected_cells[-1].y(), self.selected_cells[-1].x()

        # 合并选择的单元格
        self.table_widget.setSpan(first_row, first_col, last_row - first_row + 1, last_col - first_col + 1)

        # 更新cell_types字典
        for row in range(first_row, last_row + 1):
            for col in range(first_col, last_col + 1):
                self.cell_types[(row, col)] = (cell_type, color)  # 保存类型和颜色

        # 更新区域显示
        self.update_cell_visual(first_row, first_col, cell_type, color)

        # 清空选中的单元格
        self.selected_cells.clear()

    def mark_as_seating(self):
        for cell in self.selected_cells:
            item = QTableWidgetItem()
            item.setBackground(QColor(180, 180, 180))  # 设置背景颜色为灰色
            item.setTextAlignment(Qt.AlignCenter)
            self.table_widget.setItem(cell.row(), cell.column(), item)
            self.table_widget.item(cell.row(), cell.column()).setFlags(Qt.ItemIsEnabled | Qt.ItemIsSelectable) 

        self.selected_cells.clear()  # 清空选中的单元格

    def mousePressEvent(self, event):
        if event.button() == Qt.LeftButton:
            self.start_point = self.table_widget.indexAt(event.pos())
            if self.start_point.isValid():
                self.selected_cells = [self.start_point]

    def mouseMoveEvent(self, event):
        if event.buttons() & Qt.LeftButton:
            end_point = self.table_widget.indexAt(event.pos())
            if end_point.isValid() and end_point != self.start_point:
                rows = range(min(self.start_point.row(), end_point.row()), max(self.start_point.row(), end_point.row()) + 1)
                cols = range(min(self.start_point.column(), end_point.column()), max(self.start_point.column(), end_point.column()) + 1)
                self.selected_cells = [QPoint(row, col) for row in rows for col in cols]
                self.table_widget.clearSelection()
                for cell in self.selected_cells:
                    if self.table_widget.item(cell.row(), cell.column()) is not None:
                        self.table_widget.item(cell.row(), cell.column()).setSelected(True)

        self.mark_cells("过道", QColor(144, 238, 144))  # 浅绿色

    def mark_as_desk(self):
        self.mark_cells("讲台", QColor(210, 180, 140))  # 浅棕色

    def mark_as_wall(self):
        self.mark_cells("墙", QColor(169, 169, 169))  # 灰色

    def mark_as_door(self):
        self.mark_cells("门", QColor(255, 255, 224))  # 浅黄色

    def mark_cells(self, cell_type, color):
        if not self.selected_cells:
            return

        # 合并选择的单元格
        first_row, first_col = self.selected_cells[0].y(), self.selected_cells[0].x()
        last_row, last_col = self.selected_cells[-1].y(), self.selected_cells[-1].x()

        # 合并选择的单元格
        self.table_widget.setSpan(first_row, first_col, last_row - first_row + 1, last_col - first_col + 1)

        # 更新cell_types字典
        for row in range(first_row, last_row + 1):
            for col in range(first_col, last_col + 1):
                self.cell_types[(row, col)] = (cell_type, color)  # 保存类型和颜色

        # 更新区域显示
        self.update_cell_visual(first_row, first_col, cell_type, color)

        # 清空选中的单元格
        self.selected_cells.clear()

    def mark_as_seating(self):
        for cell in self.selected_cells:
            item = QTableWidgetItem()
            item.setBackground(QColor(180, 180, 180))  # 设置背景颜色为灰色
            item.setTextAlignment(Qt.AlignCenter)
            self.table_widget.setItem(cell.row(), cell.column(), item)
            self.table_widget.item(cell.row(), cell.column()).setFlags(Qt.ItemIsEnabled | Qt.ItemIsSelectable) 

        self.selected_cells.clear()  # 清空选中的单元格

    def mousePressEvent(self, event):
        if event.button() == Qt.LeftButton:
            self.start_point = self.table_widget.indexAt(event.pos())
            if self.start_point.isValid():
                self.selected_cells = [self.start_point]

    def mouseMoveEvent(self, event):
        if event.buttons() & Qt.LeftButton:
            end_point = self.table_widget.indexAt(event.pos())
            if end_point.isValid() and end_point != self.start_point:
                rows = range(min(self.start_point.row(), end_point.row()), max(self.start_point.row(), end_point.row()) + 1)
                cols = range(min(self.start_point.column(), end_point.column()), max(self.start_point.column(), end_point.column()) + 1)
                self.selected_cells = [QPoint(row, col) for row in rows for col in cols]
                self.table_widget.clearSelection()
                for cell in self.selected_cells:
                    if self.table_widget.item(cell.row(), cell.column()) is not None:
                        self.table_widget.item(cell.row(), cell.column()).setSelected(True)
